title: crotalaria axilliflora
intro: Crotalaria axilliflora, also known as the Indian rattlebox or rattle pod, is a flowering plant species in the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria axilliflora seeds are often used to make decoctions, infusions, and powders that can be used to treat various ailments.
